para_trans: On reconstitution of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Charitra Sadhana Prakashan Samiti.
Department of Higher and Technical Education
Government Decision No.: Narrow 2026/6 E.P. No.12694 35 / MASHI-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
1) Government Decision Education and Employment Department, No. Sankarna - 1971/8997 Karyasana (372) d. 15.03.1976
2) Government Decision Higher B. Department of Technical Education No. Sankarna 2025 / E.P. No.946792 / Mashi-II, D. 08.07.2025

Reference No. 9 The Publication Committee for Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Charitra Sadhana has been set up by a government decision here. Reference No. 2 As per the Government decision here, the term of the Committee was extended for a period of three months from the date of expiry or until the reconstitution of the Committee, whichever is earlier. Accordingly, the matter of reconstituting the committee was under the consideration of the government.
Government Decision: - The Government is approving the restructuring of the Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Charitra Sadhana Prakashan Samiti as indicated in the following statement.
table_trans: A, Directorate of Higher Education, Maharashtra State, Pune
Member of the Council of Ministers
Prof. Dr. Ishwar Tukaramji Nandpure, Nagpur

para_trans: The duration of the committee will be 03 GY.
3. Government Decision No. The procedure and terms and conditions of the Committee shall continue as prescribed under section 1.
Dr. This Government decision is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: Mr. Sima Milid Kamble Sreemasima Milidkalle A
Mr. Sagar Kusum Rustum Shide, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar
